'''Heloan Yagen''' was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Bovo Yagen system/Legends|Bovo Yagen system]]. It was named after [[Bovo Yagen]]'s [[Heloan Yagen|wife]].

{{Planet-stub}}
